formula_boundary.workbook_regression: F=beta*AR*V^2*Cr; Ft=F*sin(alpha)*cos(alpha); Fn=F*sin(alpha); evaluated yaw moment=(Fn/1000/g)*(0.6*LBP)
formula_boundary.digitalmodel_static_yaw: digitalmodel yaw_moment.rudder_yaw_moment with legacy 0.6*LBP mapped for comparison only

limitations: preliminary static rudder-induced yaw moment; not a full MMG simulation; not an incident reconstruction; not an IMO compliance assessment; no class compliance conclusion
